title: Custom Totems
description: Adds extra 3D totems that you can craft!
body:
## MORE CRAFTABLE TOTEMS!
This mod/datapack adds new cosmetic totems that **you can craft!**

**All the totems are purely cosmetic** and are made just to add a little more fun to servers and singleplayer worlds!

![Custom totems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6saOfit/images/64326a48329cbfa0dec7dec3eb12540bbfe73831_350.webp)

### You unlock the recipes by getting a totem of undying
**We have:**
- Steve Cross
- Blahaj of undying
- Uno Reverse Card
**I will be adding more in the future! Follow it for the updates!**

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6saOfit/images/1f5601dcb2fc43985f0e20f110d6348d202637d8.png)

You can see other screenshots in the gallery!

# 🦈Installation:🦈
### Mod version:
 Just put the .jar in the mod folder, **keep in mind that this is a datapack inside of a mod, items will not show up in the creative menu**
### Datapack version:
 This is both a Datapack and a ResourcePack, put the zip in both directories, ignore warnings

![Blahaj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6saOfit/images/2a05421b7d57f82dfa1a2315553034e1fe33b481.png)
